calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: All parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

Appearances: Cesar Olivardia (Petitioner in Pro Per). Neil Longa (Respondent in Pro Per). Sharon Raintre (Spanish Interpreter for the Respondent). Cesar Olivardia, Sr. (Petitioner's Father).

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Court DENIED the requests for the reasons set forth on the record.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Susan Cruzier CSR #4761. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.
